name: libgen-mcp
description: Search the Library Genesis catalog and download books and articles from Claude.
long_description:
libgen-mcp exposes three focused tools — search, get_details and download — for browsing the Library Genesis catalog and fetching files.

Search across collections (nonfiction, fiction, articles, magazines, comics, standards) with field and sort controls, pull full metadata for any record by md5 or id, and download books (by md5) or articles (by DOI) to a local directory. Book downloads try Library Genesis then a fresh-mirror fallback; article downloads try Unpaywall (open access, when a contact email is configured in unpaywall_email) then Sci-Hub.

Every setting is optional — no token or account is required. Configure the mirror, download directory, request timeout, a maximum download size and the log level from the extension settings.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the Library Genesis catalog across collections with field, paging and sort controls; returns file results with metadata and md5.

tools.name: get_details
tools.description: Fetch full metadata for a record (description, identifiers, DOI, cover, related edition) by md5 or by edition/file id.

tools.name: download
tools.description: Download a book (by md5) or article (by DOI) to a local directory; returns the saved path, size and the source that served it.

mirror.title: Mirror
mirror.description: Force a specific Library Genesis mirror, e.g. https://libgen.li. Leave empty to auto-select a reachable mirror.

timeout.title: Request timeout
timeout.description: Timeout per HTTP request as a Go duration, e.g. 30s or 2m (max 10m).

max_download_bytes.title: Maximum download size (bytes)
max_download_bytes.description: Reject downloads larger than this many bytes. 0 means no limit.

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn or error.

unpaywall_email.title: Unpaywall email
unpaywall_email.description: Contact email for the Unpaywall API, used to resolve open-access articles by DOI. Recommended if you download research papers; leave empty to disable Unpaywall.
